description: Fiction worldbuilding brainstorm: an alien faction name and homeworld (PROBED_LATER), a standing tone preference (STANDING_PREF), a character's rank that gets corrected (SUPERSEDED), and filler chit-chat.

turns.text: Let's lock the antagonist faction name, going with the Vhorrik Ascendancy, homeworld is Kessyrn-9.
The Vhorrik Ascendancy, based out of Kessyrn-9, locked in. Good hard consonants for an antagonist name.
Standing note for this whole project: keep the tone dry and understated, no purple prose, ever, even in the big dramatic beats.
Dry and understated throughout, noted, I'll keep the dramatic beats restrained rather than florid.
The Vhorrik commander we meet in chapter two is a Fleet-Marshal, name is Ozreth Kallum.
Fleet-Marshal Ozreth Kallum, chapter two, got it.
Random thought, should the ship names be numbered or actually named? Leaning named.
Named ships tend to carry more weight in the reader's memory than hull numbers.
Actually demoting Kallum, Fleet-Marshal was too senior for a chapter-two intro, he's a Wing-Captain instead, same name.
Wing-Captain Ozreth Kallum now, adjusted, that fits a chapter-two intro better anyway.
Also debating whether the protagonist should have a pet or not, feels like a cliche.
Cliche only if it's decorative, give it a mechanical function in the plot and it earns its place.
The cover artist sent a rough sketch, colors are way too saturated for the mood we want.
Worth a note back on the palette before they go further, cheaper to fix now.
Found a good reference for the ship interiors, very industrial, not sleek at all.
Industrial reads more lived-in, fits a wartime fleet better than sleek would.
Editor liked the opening chapter, one note about pacing in the middle third.
Middle-third pacing is a common note, usually a trim rather than a rewrite fixes it.
Remind me what we named the antagonist faction and their homeworld?
The Vhorrik Ascendancy, homeworld Kessyrn-9.
What's Kallum's actual rank in chapter two?
Wing-Captain.
Draft me the big confrontation scene between the protagonist and Kallum.

probes.question: Remind me what we named the antagonist faction and their homeworld?
What's Kallum's actual rank in chapter two?
Draft me the big confrontation scene between the protagonist and Kallum.
